Conferences in Theoretical Computer Science

  • Deadline ahead
  • Running conferences
  • Future conferences (deadline over)
  • Conference planning
  • Instructions
  • Included conferences

WARNING

  • If you wish your conference to be listed here … follow these instructions
  • All information on this page is given without any warranty.
  • When there are two dealine dates, the first is for the abstract, the second for the full paper.
  • All deadlines are 23:59 Anywhere on Earth (AoE) (UTC-12:00) if not stated otherwise.
  • Be aware that some special deadline times, others than AoE, might be one hour earlier, because of daylight saving time, even if the conference organizers indicated the time without the daylight saving time shift.
  • Be also aware, that the daylight saving time starts and ends on different days in Europe and North America.
  • The calendar for the years 2026 and 2027 can help you to consider the deadlines and dates.
  • Your time zone is UTC

Conference City, Country Deadline Date Notification Submission format and comments
LPAR Logic for Programming, Artificial Intelligence and Reasoning Spetses, Greece 3/17 June 2026 25-30 October 2026 3 August 2026 EasyChair, 15 pages regular, 8 pages experimental and tools, all excluding references
NCL Non-Classical Logics Toruń, Poland 10/15 June 2026 26-28 October 2026 10 August 2026 EPTCS, 12 pages excluding references full, 2 pages with references short
ICTCS Italian Conference on Theoretical Computer Science Udine, Italy 14 June 2026 7-9 September 2026 21 July 2026 CEURART, 12 pages regular, 5 pages communications, both excluding references
ICTAC International Colloquium on Theoretical Aspects of Computing Bariloche, Argentina 14/22 June 2026 11-13 November 2026 10 August 2026 LNCS, 16 pages regular, 8 pages short or tool, all excluding references up to 2 pages
APLAS Asian Symposium on Programming Languages and Systems Hong Kong, SAR China 15 June 2026 1-5 December 2026 28 July 2026 LNCS, double-blind, 17 pages excluding references
AIxIA Italian Association for Artificial Intelligence Perugia, Italy 16/23 June 2026 6-9 October 2026 25 July 2026 LNCS, 12 pages regular excluding references; CEUR, discussion, 4 pages excluding references
GandALF Games, Automata, Logics, and Formal Verification Aalborg, Denmark 18/22 June 2026 15-17 September 2026 3 August 2026 EPTCS, 14 pages excluding references
SYNASC
  Symbolic and Numeric Algorithms for Scientific Computing 		Timișoara, Romania 20 June 2026 14-17 September 2026 25 July 2026 two-column, 8 pages regular, 8 pages system descriptions and experimental, 4 pages short,
all excluding references
RP Reachability Problems Turku, Finland 21 June 2026 21-23 October 2026 3 August 2026 LNCS, 12 pages excluding references
SPIRE String Processing and Information Retrieval Hamilton, Ontario, Canada 22/29 June 2026 13-16 October 2026 10 August 2026 LNCS, 12 pages long, 6 pages short, both excluding references
ATMOS Algorithmic Approaches for Transportation Modelling, Optimization, and Systems L'Aquila, Italy 26 June 2026 3-4 September 2026 4 September 2026 OASIcs, 15 pages + 5 pages references and appendix regular, 6 pages short; part of ALGO
MIWAI Multi-Disciplinary International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Halifax, Nova Scotia, Canada 26 June 2026 10-12 October 2026 7 August 2026 LNCS, double-blind, 12 pages
ISAAC International Symposium on Algorithms and Computation Hangzhou, China 26 June 2026 6-9 December 2026 early September 2026 LIPIcs, double-blind, 12 pages excluding references
WAOA Workshop on Approximation and Online Algorithms L'Aquila, Italy 28 June 2026 3-4 September 2026 4 August 2026 A4 pager, 2 cm margins, 10-point font, double-blind, 10 pages excluding references; part of ALGO
IPEC International Symposium on Parameterized and Exact Computation L'Aquila, Italy 29 June 2026 31 August - 4 September 2026 2 August 2026 LIPIcs, double-blind, no page limit but only first 500 lines read; part of ALGO
ALGOWIN Algorithmic of Wireless Networks L'Aquila, Italy 29 June 2026 3-4 September 2026 3 August 2026 LNCS, 12 pages excluding references, post-proceedings; part of ALGO
ICTAI International Conference on Tools with Artificial Intelligence Boca Raton, Florida, USA 30 June 2026 2-4 November 2026 10 September 2026 PDF, double-blind, double-column, 10-point font, 8 pages
WINE Web and Internet Economics Hong Kong, SAR China 2 July 2026 1-4 December 2026 10 September 2026 LNCS, double-blind, 12 pages excluding references
ALGOCLOUD Algorithms for Cloud-Based Systems L'Aquila, Italy 3 July 2026 31 August - 4 September 2026 3 August 2026 LNCS, 12 pages excluding references regular, 8 pages short, 10 pages survey; part of ALGO
FSTTCS Foundations of Software Technology and Theoretical Computer Science New Delhi, India 4/11 July 2026 16-18 December 2026 15 September 2026 LIPIcs, double-blind, 15 pages excluding references
CSL Computer Science Logic Brighton, United Kingdom 8/15 July 2026 25-29 January 2027 15 October 2026 LIPIcs, double-blind, 15 pages excluding references
POPL
  Principles of Programming Languages 		Mexico City, Mexico 9 July 2026 10-16 January 2027 5 October 2026
9 November 2026		 ACMart, double-blind, 25 pages excluding references
SODA Symposium on Discrete Algorithms Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, USA 9 July 2026 24-27 January 2027 double-blind, no page limit
VSTTE Verified Software: Theories, Tools, and Experiments Graz, Austria 10/17 July 2026 14 September 2026 22 August 2026 LNCS, post-proceeding; co-located with FMCAD
AAAI
  Artificial Intelligence 		Montreal, Canada 21/28 July 2026 16-23 February 2027 24 September 2026
30 November 2026
SOFSEM Current Trends in Theory and Practice of Computer Science Ioannina, Greece 15/18 September 2026 2-5 February 2027 10 November 2026 LNCS, 12 pages excluding references
WADT Workshop on Algebraic Development Techniques 17 September 2026 29 June - 3 July 2026 29 October 2026 post-proceedings
ESOP European Symposium on Programming Copenhagen, Denmark 15 October 2026 10-15 April 2027 22 December 2026 LNCS, 25 pages regular, 15 pages experience and fresh perspectives; part of ETAPS
FoSSaCS Foundations of Software Science and Computation Structures Copenhagen, Denmark 15 October 2026 10-15 April 2027 22 December 2026 LNCS, 18 pages regular; part of ETAPS
iFS Foundations and Formal Methods for Software and Systems Copenhagen, Denmark 15 October 2026 10-15 April 2027 22 December 2026 LNCS, 16 pages + 2 pages references long, 8 pages + 1 page references short; part of ETAPS
TACAS Tools and Algorithms for the Construction and Analysis of Systems Copenhagen, Denmark 15 October 2026 10-15 April 2027 22 December 2026 LNCS, 18 pages regular, 6 pages tool demonstrations; part of ETAPS

Conference planning

  • Home
  • Deadline ahead
  • Running conferences
  • Future conferences (deadline over)
  • Conference planning
  • Instructions
  • Included conferences

This section serves

  1. for planning conferences in the future,
  2. to indicate the planned (tentative) dates for a conference, and
  3. to inform organizers of other conferences about these dates to avoid scheduling clashes.

The calendar for the years 2026 and 2027 can help you to plan the conferences.

If you wish the tentative schedule of your conference to be listed here, send me an e-mail (change  _at_  to @ and  _dot_  twice to .) with the following template:

E-mail with a template for a planned conference

Conference Year City, Country Starting date Ending date Remark
FLoC Federated Logic Conference 2026 Lisbon, Portugal 18 July 2026 29 July 2026 summer school 13-17 July 2026; includes CAV, CP, CSF, FSCD, ICLP, IJCAR, ITP, KR, LICS, SAT
ALGO Federated Conference on Algorithms 2026 L'Aquila, Italy 31 August 2026 4 September 2026 federated conference including ALGOCLOUD, ALGOWIN, ATMOS, ESA, IPEC, WABI, and WAOA
LAP Logic and Applications 2026 Dubrovnik, Croatia 23 September 2026 27 September 2026
SPLASH Systems, Programming, Languages, and Applications: Software for Humanity 2026 Oakland, California, USA 3 October 2026 9 October 2026
OPODIS On Principles of Distributed Systems 2026 Madrid, Spain 9 December 2026 11 December 2026
ALENEX Algorithm Engineering and Experiments 2027 Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, USA 24 January 2027 25 January 2027 co-located with SODA
SOSA Symposium on Simplicity in Algorithms 2027 Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, USA 25 January 2027 26 January 2027 co-located with SODA
STACS Symposium on Theoretical Aspects of Computer Science 2027 Göttingen, Germany 8 March 2027 12 March 2027 no proper web page yet
EDBT Extending Database Technology 2027 Lille, France 6 April 2027 9 April 2027
ICDT International Conference on Database Theory 2027 Lille, France 6 April 2027 9 April 2027
EuroCG European Workshop on Computational Geometry 2027 Norrköping, Sweden 6 April 2027 9 April 2027
ETAPS European Joint Conferences on Theory & Practice of Software 2027 Copenhagen, Denmark 10 April 2027 15 April 2027 federated conference including ESOP, FoSSaCS, iFS, and TACAS
Conference Year City, Country Starting date Ending date Remark

Instructions for listing your conference here

  • Home
  • Deadline ahead
  • Running conferences
  • Future conferences (deadline over)
  • Conference planning
  • Instructions
  • Included conferences

If you wish your conference to be listed here, send me an e-mail (change  _at_  to @ and  _dot_  twice to .) with one of the following templates:

E-mail with a template for a conference with its deadline ahead

E-mail with a template for a future conference with deadline over

This webpage is updated regularly, at least once a day. Only serious conferences in connection with theoretical computer science will be listed.

Following conferences are included in this list

If you are an organizer of one of these conferences and you do not see that conference listed here. please send me a messsage using the aforementioned instructions.
